name: diag-md-editor
description: Force Alice to be a markdown node, dispatch a synthetic dblclick on the renderer to open the editor, screenshot.

commands:
(async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 800)); const store = window.__qualiaRenderer?.getSceneManager?.()?._store; if (!store) return { error: 'no store' }; store.updateNode('alice', { type: 'markdown', notes: 'Alice is the CTO and **runs the eng org**.

Key responsibilities:
- product strategy
- engineering org
- hiring' }); store.dispatch({ type: 'NODE_TYPE_REGISTER', payload: { descriptor: { id: 'markdown', label: 'Markdown', category: 'media', color: '#88aaff', icon: 'document', baseRadius: 0.9 } } }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 600)); return { aliceType: store.state.nodes.get('alice')?.type, notes: store.state.nodes.get('alice')?.notes?.slice(0, 30) }; })()

(async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 400)); const sm = window.__qualiaRenderer.getSceneManager(); const im = sm.interaction; im.simulateNodeClick?.('alice'); return { clicked: true }; })()
